About Us

Who We Are

Tradenlogic is a full-service environmental solutions company built on responsibility, precision and sustainable practice. We operate across waste management, material recovery, used asset trading and structural demolition — transforming what others discard into valuable resource.

From routine commercial waste contracts and bulk scrap metal trading to large-scale used equipment acquisitions and controlled multi-building demolition, our certified team delivers excellence on every project — on time, within budget and in full regulatory compliance.

Headquartered in Dubai, UAE, we serve clients across the Middle East and beyond with an unwavering commitment to transparency, safety and measurable environmental impact.

Partner With Us

Our Mission

🎯

Safe, innovative and sustainable services that protect the environment while creating tangible value for every client we serve.

Our Vision

🌍

A circular economy where every tonne of waste becomes a resource, every demolition project fuels recovery, and every asset finds new life.

Our Values

⚓

Safety first. Environmental stewardship. Transparent partnerships. Integrity from first consultation to final clearance certificate.

Certifications

📋

Fully licensed across waste carrier, demolition contractor and environmental management, complying with UAE and international frameworks.

Our Products

What We Buy & Trade

We buy, trade and process scrap materials, used assets and decommissioned equipment — competitive rates, reliable collection and full documentation across the UAE and internationally.

Recycling

Scrap Recycling

Full-service scrap and mixed material recycling with certified waste transfer documentation and maximum landfill diversion.

Demolition

Building Demolition

Large-scale controlled demolition — multi-structure projects with full site clearance and maximum material recovery.

Scrap Metals

Copper Scrap

High-grade copper wire, pipes, fittings and industrial offcuts. Competitive rates with on-site collection available.

Scrap Metals

Aluminium Scrap

All grades — extrusions, cast, sheet and foil. Certified weighing for commercial and industrial volumes.

Scrap Metals

Brass Scrap

Yellow brass, red brass and bronze. Industrial and mixed loads at competitive market rates.

Oilfield

Oilfield Scrap

Pipework, valves, structural steel and decommissioned oilfield equipment. Full end-to-end project management.

Demolition

Demolition Scrap

Structural steel, rebar, copper cabling and recovered materials from demolition and clearance projects.

Scrap Metals

Titanium Scrap

Aerospace, medical and industrial titanium. Expert grading and competitive pricing for all grades.

Used Assets

Used Furniture

Bulk purchase of commercial and industrial furniture for resale, repurpose or responsible recycling.

Used Assets

Used Oilfield Ship

Acquisition and decommissioning of oilfield support vessels from survey to full material recovery.

Used Assets

Used Oilfield Barge

Used oilfield barges and floating plant. Safe dismantling with certified material recovery.

Used Assets

Used Generator

Diesel, gas and industrial generators — single units to full plant collections across the UAE.

Used Assets

Used Machinery

Lathes, presses, CNC equipment and complete factory clearances for resale or scrap.

Used Assets

Used Electrical

Switchgear, transformers, distribution boards and cabling from decommissioning projects.

Used Assets

Used Turbine

Gas, steam and wind turbines — expert logistics, dismantling and full material recovery.

Used Assets

Used Heavy Equipment

Excavators, bulldozers and cranes purchased for reuse or scrap. Regional collection available.

Used Assets

Used Heavy Machinery

Mills, presses, compressors and processing plant. Full clearance and logistics arranged.

Our Services

What We Do

From scrap trading and waste collection to demolition and environmental consulting — delivered with precision and a commitment to sustainable outcomes.

01

Waste Management

Comprehensive collection, segregation, transport and disposal — from routine contracts to emergency industrial clearances.

  • Commercial & industrial waste
  • Hazardous waste handling
  • Skip hire & bulk clearance
  • Compliance reporting
02

Recycling Solutions

Advanced material recovery returning valuable materials back into the production cycle across all sectors.

  • Metals, plastics & paper
  • E-waste recovery
  • Construction waste recycling
  • Transfer documentation
03

Building Demolition

Safe, controlled and compliant demolition from single structures to entire multi-building site clearances.

  • Full & partial demolition
  • Strip-out & defit
  • Asbestos & hazmat removal
  • Site clearance
04

Environmental Consulting

Strategic advisory helping clients achieve zero-waste targets through plans, audits and sustainability roadmaps.

  • Waste reduction strategy
  • Impact assessments
  • Zero-waste programmes
  • Compliance advisory
05

Logistics & Haulage

Specialist fleet providing tracked, insured transport for waste, recycling, scrap and demolition debris.

  • RoRo & skip containers
  • Tipper & grab lorry
  • GPS-tracked fleet
  • Emergency haulage
06

Asset Decommissioning

End-to-end decommissioning of oilfield equipment, ships and heavy machinery with full compliance and material recovery.

  • Oilfield & marine decom
  • Industrial plant clearance
  • Hazmat removal
  • Material recovery
Why Tradenlogic

The Tradenlogic Difference

“We don’t just remove waste — we transform it into opportunity, and every cleared site into a foundation for what comes next.”
— Tradenlogic

With over 15 years of industry experience, a certified workforce and specialist equipment, Tradenlogic is the partner of choice for clients who demand reliability, safety and measurable results.

01

Fully Licensed & Insured

All operations under appropriate environmental and contractor licences with comprehensive insurance on every project.

02

Safety-First Culture

Rigorous H&S protocols, trained operatives and full site risk assessments. Zero compromise on safety.

03

Sustainable by Design

Maximum material recovery and landfill diversion with full waste transfer documentation and sustainability reporting.

04

Transparent Pricing

Clear, competitive quotations with detailed breakdowns upfront — no hidden fees, no surprises.

05

Regional & International Reach

Operating across the UAE, Middle East and internationally with export logistics and global trading networks.
